description: Style Note This structured shoe from arrow for men has a slim silhouette. The interesting cutouts referencing the classic Scottish brogue on this single buckle low-top pair, refines your formal look. With slick suiting or toned-down shirt and trousers, these shoes crafted from Italian leather add a definite panache to your ensemble.  Product Details Black shoe with genuine leather upper with reinforced overlays on the midfoot and heel collar, perforations on the toe box for breathability, dotted cutouts on the midfoot overlay, brand button on the lateral side of the heel abd central lace up system Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper for durability TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
